title: Sgidek
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Sgidek_shu.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] ''Sgidek'' moving in to begin docking with a [[Habeen]] container.]]
[[Habeen]] researchers used [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] '''''Sgidek''''' at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shuttle ''Sgidek'' docked with several Habeen containers at their deep-space research facility, rescuing critical [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology from an attack by [[Nharwaak]] dissidents.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
